title: Steward + credentialed expert-reviewer outreach (status logged)
context: No partner/steward is yet secured (verifiedNeed: false); M0 requires a named License/ToS reviewer AND a credentialed biomedical/oncology accuracy reviewer. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Initiate outreach to candidate stewards and credentialed biomedical/oncology + license reviewers, and log status against the M0 reviewer-seat requirement.
acceptanceCriteria: Candidate stewards and a credentialed biomedical/oncology accuracy reviewer + a License/ToS reviewer are identified and contacted.
Outreach status is logged (contacted / responded / committed) with dates.
The documented PLAN.md fallback is referenced for any unfilled reviewer seat (hard exit for M0).
output: An outreach/status log document (review/partners.md or equivalent), committed via PR.
